name: Tape Choir
explanation: A tape-replay keyboard: each key triggers a sustained, sampled string-ensemble voice that is pitch-tracked, looped with a crossfade for endless sustain, and shaped by an ADSR, tape wow/flutter, a tone low-pass and gentle tape saturation. The embedded voice is a public-domain (CC0) recording, baked into the plugin so it is fully self-contained. Controls: Attack, Release, Tone, Flutter, Drive, Tune and Level.
